offer: For hospitality procurement officers processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes late orders and supplier penalties. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of purchase orders and supplier invoices.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for hospitality procurement officers
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to hospitality procurement officers with demo video
Community forums for hospitality procurement tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual entry of 1-3 purchase orders
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing invoice data
